Rationale: Fig.4: "Immunoelectron microscopic localization of annexin V in intact rat central nervous tissue"
- "

Fig.5: "Rat brain synaptosomes immunolabeled with annexin V antibodies"
- "

Fig.6: "Electron micrographs of purified rat synaptic vesicles"
- "

Fig.7: "Electron microscopic profiles of purified human annexin V and synaptic vesicles"

- "Judging from the immunolabeling using synaptosomal fraction, annexin V is expected to be specifically associated with synaptic vesicles...we found that the result of immunolabeling for annexin V was similar to that for synaptophysin. Immunogold particles indicating annexin V preferentially labeled synaptic vesicles (Fig. 6c). ". Experimental description: - "Rats (Wistar, 200-250 g) anesthetized with chloral hydrate..."
